jobDescription: We are looking for a Senior Python Developer with 5+ years of experience. Required skills: Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS. Nice to have: PyTorch, Redis, microservices architecture.
resumeTexts:
John Smith | john@example.com | (555) 123-4567
Senior Python Engineer

Experience:
- Senior Python Developer at TechCorp (2020-present) - 4 years
  * Built FastAPI microservices for real-time data processing
  * Designed PostgreSQL schemas for 100M+ records
  * Deployed applications on AWS using Docker and Kubernetes
  * Mentored 5 junior developers

- Python Developer at DataStartup (2018-2020) - 2 years
  * Developed data pipelines using Python and pandas
  * Worked with Redis for caching

Education:
- B.S. in Computer Science, Tech University (2018)

Skills: Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, PyTorch, Git, Linux
